description_long: This object is a discarded aluminum beverage can, cylindrical in shape with a slightly indented top and bottom. The can is predominantly red with a large, white, swooping graphic on one side, reminiscent of popular soda branding, though no explicit brand name is visible. The top features a standard metallic pull tab and a circular opening area, typical of carbonated drink cans. The surface appears smooth and metallic, with a matte to slightly glossy finish, and there are no visible dents, rust, or damage marks. On one side, there are two vertical pale panels with faint text, possibly indicating a label or nutritional information. The can is empty, lightweight, and would be commonly found as litter in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or streets.
description: A red, empty aluminum beverage can with a white swooping graphic and a standard pull tab top, showing no visible damage.
description_view_0: The can is shown with a partial white circular graphic on a red background and the metallic top with a pull tab is visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights two vertical pale panels with faint text on the red can, likely representing a label or information area.
description_view_2: The can displays a partial white swoosh on a red background, with the top and pull tab also visible.
description_view_3: A large, abstract white swooping graphic dominates the red surface, with the can's top edge visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, white, abstract swooping graphic resembling a popular soda brand, but no explicit brand name or logo is visible.
